title: empty ChatContact/set patch {} on non-existent contact returns updated
description: Trigger: ChatContact/set update with {} for an id that does not exist in chat_contact. any_update stays false; the empty-patch branch (jmap.rs ~555) runs updated.insert without checking existence. RFC 8620 §7.1 requires notFound when the id is not a known object. The existing test inserts a real contact first, so this path is untested.
